checks.description: Canonical inbound fixture satisfies the ACH file contract
checks.expectedOutcome: Validator returns PASS with no violations

checks.description: Malformed later rows are validated, not just the first row
checks.expectedOutcome: Validator returns FAIL with ACH-FILE-001-TYPE-MERCHANT mentioning row 3

checks.description: Extra columns are surfaced as non-breaking drift
Column-order drift is surfaced as a warning
Happy-path trigger response matches the contract
checks.expectedOutcome: Scenario clean_trigger satisfies the API contract

checks.description: Concurrent trigger conflict response matches the contract
checks.expectedOutcome: Scenario concurrent_trigger satisfies the API contract
checks.actualOutcome: status=409, contentType=text/plain;charset=UTF-8, body="Pipeline is already running"

checks.description: Idle poll response matches the contract
checks.expectedOutcome: Scenario pipeline_idle satisfies the API contract

checks.description: Running poll response matches the contract
checks.expectedOutcome: Scenario pipeline_running satisfies the API contract

checks.description: Clean baseline run satisfies all scoped reconciliation invariants
checks.expectedOutcome: Scoped invariant check returns PASS with no violations

checks.description: Rejected rows are excluded from INV-003 count and total calculations
checks.expectedOutcome: Scoped invariant check passes with no INV-003 violations

checks.description: Tampered staged totals are detected as INV-003-TOTAL
checks.expectedOutcome: Scoped invariant check fails with INV-003-TOTAL only

checks.description: Historical bad reconciliations do not poison a later scoped clean run
checks.expectedOutcome: Scoped invariant check returns PASS for the later clean batch_ids

replayResults.description: Baseline happy path — 3 valid records, all posted, reconciliation passes
replayResults.purpose: Control case: proves the replay harness, Testcontainers setup, DB queries, and reporting all work end to end. If this fails, the environment is broken, not the scenarios.
replayResults.whatWouldBreakThis: Any harness breakage, fixture drift, database setup issue, or posting/reconciliation regression would cause the baseline control case to fail.
replayResults.expectedSummary: staged=3, posted=3, rejected=0, errors=0, total=31500, reconRows=1
replayResults.actualSummary: staged=3, posted=3, rejected=0, errors=0, total=31500, reconRows=1, countsMatch=true, totalsMatch=true, perRunMatch=n/a

replayResults.description: Sequential run isolation — same fixture run twice, each run scoped by run.id timestamp
replayResults.purpose: Proves the reconcile job's WHERE bj.started_at >= ? filter correctly isolates each run's reconciliation. If this filter is removed or broken, run 2 would aggregate both runs' batches and produce a staged_count of 6 instead of 3.
replayResults.whatWouldBreakThis: Removing or broadening the started_at >= ? filter in ReconcileJobConfig would cause run 2 to include run 1's batches, inflating staged_count and posted_count to 6 in a single reconciliation row.
replayResults.expectedSummary: staged=6, posted=6, rejected=0, errors=0, total=63000, per-run staged=3, per-run posted=3, per-run total=31500, aggregateReconRows=2
replayResults.actualSummary: staged=6, posted=6, rejected=0, errors=0, total=63000, reconRows=2, countsMatch=true, totalsMatch=true, perRunMatch=true

replayResults.description: Validation skip — bad row rejected, pipeline completes, reconciliation excludes rejected row
replayResults.purpose: Proves that Spring Batch's skip policy tolerates ValidationException, that rejected rows are correctly tracked in batch_job_errors, and that reconciliation's WHERE status='posted' filter excludes rejected records from staged_count.
replayResults.whatWouldBreakThis: Changing the skip-policy limit to 0, removing ValidationException from the skippable-exception list, or removing the status='posted' filter in ReconcileJobConfig would all cause this test to fail.
replayResults.expectedSummary: staged=3, posted=2, rejected=1, errors=1, total=6500, reconRows=1
replayResults.actualSummary: staged=3, posted=2, rejected=1, errors=1, total=6500, reconRows=1, countsMatch=true, totalsMatch=true, perRunMatch=n/a
